name: Lima"liver
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lima beans.
2. Sauté the onions in a pan until they are soft and translucent.
3. In a blender, combine the cooked lima beans, sautéed onions, hard-boiled eggs, ground nuts, and salt.
4. Blend all ingredients together until you achieve a spreading consistency.
Recipe By: Karen Weston (kweston@UTDALLAS.EDU)
